Store Information Assistance.description: Providing users with information on store locations, hours, and directions.

Product and Service Inquiry.description: Assisting users with inquiries about products, special services, return policies, loyalty programs, and service bookings.
user_actions: Wants to know about products available

Online Order Management.description: Handling user requests related to online orders, including inquiries, confirmations, modifications, and feedback.
user_actions: Wishes to give feedback or read reviews
bot_actions: Offers feedback options or shows reviews

Additional Assistance and Conclusion.description: Providing further assistance based on user satisfaction, additional queries, or concluding the conversation.
user_actions: Expresses satisfaction or has further queries
Requests more info or ends conversation
bot_actions: Provides further assistance or concludes the conversation
